name: skylight-mcp
description: Query and manage your Skylight family calendar, chores, lists, and rewards
long_description: Connect Claude to your Skylight Calendar account for natural-language access to family calendars, chores, grocery and to-do lists, tasks, family members, and rewards. Built on top of the reverse-engineered Skylight API. This is a maintained continuation of TheEagleByte/skylight-mcp.

email.title: Skylight Email
email.description: Email address for your Skylight account

frame_id.title: Frame ID
frame_id.description: Your household frame ID. See the project README for how to find it via a proxy tool.

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.description: IANA timezone (e.g., America/New_York, Europe/London). Defaults to America/New_York.
